ShortDescription.Value: Turn your city's metro network into a clean, readable metro map.

Publish.LongDescription:
Turn the metro/subway network of your Cities: Skylines II city into a clean, official-style metro map.
This mod exports your city's metro network to a JSON file. You then open that file in the free companion Windows Viewer app to render the map and save it as SVG, PNG, or PDF (great for wallpapers, posters, printing, or sharing your transit system).
How to use: 1. In game: Options > CS2 Metro Diagram, choose Auto / English / Simplified Chinese, pick an export folder, and click "Export Real Metro JSON". 2. Open the Viewer app, click "Open Default Export", and your map appears. 3. Adjust the layout/size if you like, then save as SVG, PNG, or PDF.
The default map layout draws lines horizontal, vertical, or 45-degree, renders lines that share a track as parallel lines, and fills the canvas — the same conventions real metro maps use.
Download the Viewer and full source from GitHub: https://github.com/Eriksas/Cities-Skylines-2-Metro-Viewer
Beta notes: - Metro/subway only. - Exports data only; it never edits your city. - No in-game preview yet — rendering happens in the Viewer app.
Publish.ChangeLog: Beta.2 hotfix: - Fixed a startup race that could leave the options page showing raw localization keys. - Register localization before exposing the options page and only for locales supported by the current game build. - Made partial initialization and mod disposal null-safe during playset or subscription refreshes.
